subject: large unkempt humanoid figure with wild hair and beard, mouth open wide in taunt or yell
description: A large, heavyset humanoid figure with disheveled wild hair and a thick beard dominates the frame, mouth stretched open wide in what appears to be a taunt or roar. The card name and game context identify this as Bacterian, a fighter from the World Martial Arts Tournament in Dragon Ball. A 'SAMPLE' watermark is overlaid on the image.
